description: Neil Chatterjee, CEO of Dawn and Andrena, discusses the potential of decentralized broadband networks on Solana, aiming to reduce internet costs for consumers from $128 to $10 per month. He emphasizes the importance of connectivity sovereignty and the role of Deepin in digital infrastructure.
topic_summary: Exploration of decentralized broadband networks and their impact on internet costs and connectivity, featuring insights from Neil Chatterjee on the Dawn protocol and its integration with Solana [t=0:16-0:37].
